about.origin_p1: I work on AI transformation for a group everyone knows. Lots of meetings. Lots of new words. More than once, I caught myself nodding along, not entirely sure I understood what we were actually talking about.
about.origin_p2: One day I asked Claude: what are the 10 terms I actually need? Give me a dead-simple definition and what I absolutely have to know. Then: one sentence for each, natural enough to say in a meeting without sounding like I'd memorized it the night before.
about.origin_p3: The best cheat sheet I'd ever made. I had to share it. And since I needed a good excuse to try Claude Code, the timing was perfect.
about.roadmap_sub: Every item on this list came from a real conversation. Mostly with humans.
about.roadmap_error: Could not load roadmap data. Please try again later.
about.cta_sub: Your IT department called. It’s the only shadow AI they tolerate.
